chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1732 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.7460/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 12.03.2024 Mr. Humail Rafi Mahesar, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with SIP Azam Hasnain of Police Station Shaheed Murtaza Mirani, Khairpur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- IO has filed a report stating that case against petitioner No.2 and others has been disposed of under ‘C’ class and such report has been submitted before the Magistrate concerned, who has accepted it. Counsel for petitioner is satisfied, and this petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
